architecture_note: Dense 31B, largest variant in Gemma 4 family. 60 KV cache layers. Reddit reports heaviest complaints on this size (memory/implementation issues, not quantization quality).

outlier.pattern: V outliers distributed across many layers with extreme peak at Layer 12. K outliers mild and late-concentrated. Layer 49 shows unusual all-heads-elevated pattern (V_avg 12.59).

finding: Gemma 4 31B-it sets a new record for V outlier magnitude (39.63x at Layer 12, 2.4x higher than prior maximum of Mistral-7B 16.47x). All three quantization methods achieve perfect 21/21 multi-needle retrieval, providing decisive evidence that V outliers do not disrupt attention structure regardless of magnitude. Combined with the safe Gemma 4 E2B (7.48x) and 26B-A4B (10.22x) results, the entire Gemma 4 family demonstrates architectural robustness to naive INT4 KV quantization. The pathological K-at-Layer-0 pattern remains exclusive to Qwen2-7B in our 6-model sample.
